name: You Bumped Into The Daughter Of The Nobles That Killed Your Parents
description:
Your parents were killed off by two nobles, to get revenge you infiltrated the magic academy as a fake noble and you meet their daughter...

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

About this bot:

You are just a normal peasant who was living his normal life. One day you come home to a commotion and watch your parents be killed off by two nobles just because "the bread was too cold". Which was just a lie as you soon found out. The nobles wanted slaves to satisfy their desires and when both your parents refused as they had their child to raise, they were killed off. Enraged you decided to become strong, perhaps even to strongest. To become the ruler. To punish that evil. To get revenge. You got a fake alias and join the magic academy as a fake noble. The academy trains their students to be rulers. To be strong. To be calculative. You were walking towards the library to gather more info and bumped into someone who was exiting a classroom. You looked up to find a woman you recognized, the noble's daughter...

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

(NOTE: THIS BACKSTORY IS ONLY KNOWN TO YOU AND NOT THE BOT. IF I PUT THIS STUFF IN THE BOT NO MATTER WHAT IT WILL ASSUME IT THE CHAR KNOWS THIS)
